name: Venefica Love Bar
descrip: A bar of carefully foil wrapped chocolate with a blank, deep red sleeve. It's infused with Venefica's magic, sugar from her sweat, milk from her breasts, as well as some of her saliva and 'love' juices. Restores [ItemEnergy] energy and [ItemSpirit] spirit.
useOutcome: [AttackerName] eats the Love Bar, and the wonderfully sweet chocolate melts in [AttackerHisOrHer] mouth, flooding [AttackerHimOrHer] with syrupy, magical energy that distinctly reminds [AttackerHimOrHer] of Venefica.
